title: Harihar Dham

overview.short: Harihar Dham temple, commonly known as Harihar Dham located in Bagodar, Giridih, of Indian state of Jharkhand has the distinction of having Shivalinga.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Harihar Dham?
faq.a: The best time to visit Harihar Dham is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Harihar Dham?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Harihar Dham?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Harihar Dham at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Harihar Dham?
faq.a: Stays in Harihar Dham start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Harihar Dham?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bagodar, Bagodar (community development block), Hesla, Bishnugarh (community development block), Cherra, Hazaribagh.
